vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách (tuổi thơ)
vocab.example: During my formative years, long car journeys were a staple of our family summer vacations.

vocab.meaning: tuyến đường có phong cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: My father always insisted on taking the scenic route, which allowed us to marvel at the rolling hills.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thoát ly thực tại
vocab.example: Staring out the window provided a profound sense of escapism as I watched the world whiz by.
Being stuck in a confined space with my siblings often led to petty squabbles over legroom.
I didn't always enjoy the trips because I was prone to car sickness, especially on winding mountain roads.

vocab.meaning: cơ hội để gắn kết tình cảm
vocab.example: Those lengthy drives served as a great bonding opportunity for us to sing along to old cassette tapes.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên cảm giác hoài niệm
vocab.example: Thinking back to those road trips always evokes a strong feeling of nostalgia for simpler times.
As a child, I had boundless curiosity about the different landmarks we passed along the highway.

vocab.meaning: đường cao tốc đơn điệu/tẻ nhạt
vocab.example: The most tedious part was traversing the monotonous highway for hours without any change in scenery.

vocab.meaning: những lần dừng chân ngẫu hứng
vocab.example: What I loved most were the spontaneous stops at roadside diners or hidden waterfalls.
